NAVAREA XIX 105/25
 ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 01SEP TO 08SEP DAILY FROM 1300-0200 UTC. FROM 08SEP TO 28SEP DAILY FROM 1600-0200.
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA
